nodes.label: sanad-student-final.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad legal app Student View (صباح الطالب). Shows the student dashboard with tab navigation, summary stats, upcoming deadlines list, recent lectures panel, a terms-progress sidebar widget, and a daily legal news digest. The app is in Arabic (RTL), targets law students in Saudi Arabia, and includes a footer confirming PWA and local-server encryption.

nodes.label: Student Dashboard Layout Design
nodes.description: Design pattern: two-column layout for the student home tab. Left column (wide) holds the This-Week summary card, stats row, upcoming deadlines list, and recent lectures. Right column (narrow sidebar) holds terms-progress widget and daily legal digest. RTL Arabic layout throughout.

nodes.label: Daily Legal Digest Widget
nodes.description: Right-sidebar widget (الموجز اليومي) surfacing curated legal news items from Saudi government bodies: Ministry of Justice (وزارة العدل) digital court portal V3, Ministry of HR (الموارد البشرية) work-from-home policy, Zakat Authority (هيئة الزكاة) VAT Q2 reminder.

nodes.label: Student Role Mode
nodes.description: The app supports a role switcher in the top bar (طالب/محامي — Student/Lawyer). In Student mode the entire UI reorients to academic tracking: lectures, deadlines, terms, and casebook study rather than professional case management.
